cleavage agent: 1 μg of sequencing grade modified Trypsin (Promega)
fragmentation method: MS/MS data were obtained with a higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
instrument: Orbitrap Q Exactive plus mass spectrometer
ionization type: that were ionized with electrospray ionization
labeling: 30 μL of TMT-10plex (Thermo Scientific) reagent was added
reduction reagent: adding 1.5 μL of 200 mM dithiothreitol (DTT, Sigma)
reduction concentration: adding 1.5 μL of 200 mM dithiothreitol (DTT, Sigma)
